invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破1900（基于ATR 44.7439和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 1900 (based on ATR 44.7439 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.09（基于ATR 0.002和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.09 (based on ATR 0.002 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).
